feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Will extra fee will be incurred if desktop agent will be needed to use in automation process of SBPA
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am now checking for how to attach the file (that is uploaded in the DMS via sap build process automation approval request) to email.

And I found one approach that will be needed to create automation process and use desktop agent.

The approach steps are

1. upload the file via sap BPA approval request

2. file will be uploaded in the DMS

3. create automation process that is able to download the file of DMS to local PC path

4. attach the local PC path in send mail activity

 

For step 3 and step 4, the automation process is needed to create and desktop agent is needed to use.

And as my checking, if we use desktop agent, we will need to subscribe for attendant or unattedant mode.

Is my understanding correct and if this approach will be use, the extra fee of using desktop agent will be incurred or not?

 

If yes, since the fee of attendant or unattendant is a bit pircey, is there any possible workaround that can be processed like that kind of approach (sending attachment to mail from sap BPA) without costing any extra fee?

Could you please give any idea on it?

entry.title: Could NOT subscribe SAP build process automation for my BTP trial account
entry.content:
Dear all gurus,

  I have just created my BTP trial account and chosen SG server. I want to subscribe "SAP build process automation" (free plan). However, it failed for several times. Might I know how to solve the issue? Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation free plan screen
entry.content:
Hi Learners,

Why the Free tier SAP Build process Automation is showing like this? I was doing Develop and automate with SAP Build course and doing this section Automating Processes with SAP Build Automation.

Regards

Kunal Bisht

entry.title: SAP Task Center with SAP Build Process Automation no Approve/Reject button on Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi,

I activated SAP Task Center connecting it to SAP Build Process Automation.

So far so good, but when I view the task on SAP Mobile Start it is not presenting the Approve/Reject buttons.

Does anyone know if it is a product limitation or if I am missing a configuration somewhere?

Regards,

Mauricio

entry.title: Destination not showing in define variables in build process automation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

In SAP Build Process automation I'm using environment variables for a destination to my process automation instance. When i'm deploying my project the destination is not listed.

 

The additional properties i use in my destination are:

Does anyone know what i'm doing wrong? Thanks in advance

entry.title: Build Process Automation in virtual environment does not work correctly
entry.content:
Hi, I have an automation that uses web and sap ui SDKs. It runs on S/4 public cloud in Fiori Launchpad in browser. The goal is to have this automation in virtual environment. However when I tried to run the scenario, that worked fine when beiing connected to virtual environment and running it from there, it worked. But whenever I minimize Windows app (that I use for remote connection) or disconnect completely and run the trigger from elsewhere, it starts but actually doesnt do what I need.

Automation gets to bookmark Payments processed and should get number of lines. It actually does that but count is not 2 like in picture below, but zero.

This is what it actually gets in trace:

Any idea how to fix this issue?

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Build Process Automation fails only to send emails within process execution
entry.content:
I have added a process to send an email within a BPA process.

On the BTP Cockpit, we have set Destination to an external SMTP mail service (using Amazon SES), and test mail sending from [Control Tower] -> [Mail Server] in BPA is sending mail without problems.

When I send an email in the process, I am getting an authentication error, but I don't know how to resolve it.
Does the handling of authentication information in Destination change in the process?

Could not send email: The server 'XXXXXXXXXXXXX.amazonaws.com' could be reached, but the login with the given credentials failed. The server has returned the following message: '535 Authentication Credentials Invalid'.

entry.title: Build Process Automation (BPA/IRPA) scroll web screens and getting elements
entry.content:
Hello, I am facing issue getting list of values in case that some are not visible and screen need to be scrolled vertically.

I am using activities to get count (nr of used lines) and their values - these activities are not configurable and only get array of visible values. If list is longer, I need to scroll. Only working solution I found is to declare scroll element, then use Mouse click on it and then Scroll Wheel

But how to get all values and do not duplicate them? If I scroll and count elements (or get values) I always get what is visible on screen, without any relation what was previously already captured. Is there any standard approach or best practice for this? 

Many thanks.

entry.title: Build Process Automation notification email with URL to approval form
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to send a notification email to the recipients of an approval form in a Build Process Automation workflow.
I want to include the URL to the approval form in the body of the email, but I can't include it in the notification email because the URL is confirmed when the step is moved to the approval form, even if I place the email action before the approval form step.
Please let me know if there is a way to include the URL to the approval form in the notification email.

Best regards.

entry.title: Excluding applicants from an approver group in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to assign a group to the recipients of an approval form in a Build Process Automation workflow and exclude an applicant from if the applicant is a member of that group.
Please let me know if there is a feasible way to do this.

Best regards.

entry.title: BPI_FORMS_RUNTIME_SERVER_ERROR: Unable to each runtime server
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’m currently working on a Business Process project using SAP Build Process Automation, and I’ve encountered a runtime server issue when trying to import the task UI of the workflow. The error message displayed is:

 

Process followed : 

1. Verify the HTML5 Applications in BTP :

2. Import your SAP UI5 form in SAP Build Process Automation



3. Filled the Import Form details:

 

Issue  : 





What I’ve Tried

  • Verified that all services in SAP BTP Cockpit are up and running.

  • Checked for any missing form configurations or deployment issues.

  • Tried redeploying the process and re-authenticating with my BTP account.

What I Need Help With

  • What exactly causes the BPI_FORMS_RUNTIME_SERVER_ERROR?

  • Are there specific services or destinations that must be enabled for the runtime server to be reachable?

  • Has anyone faced similar issues when working with SAP Build Process Automation forms or workflows?


    Environment Details

    • SAP BTP: Cloud Foundry environment

    • Service: SAP Build Process Automation

    • Use Case: Custom workflow with Task UI used for approvals

 

 

If anyone has faced and resolved this issue or has any insights your help would be greatly appreciated. Please feel free to share possible causes or diagnostic steps to try.

Thanks in advance!

 

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Actions in SAP Build Process Automation -- Need to call $Batch in Action Task
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to implement a batch call in Build Process Automation using an Action Task. I have configured the destination in the BTP Cockpit and also created an Action Project in SAP Build.

When testing the Action Project independently, I am able to retrieve the expected data. However, when using it within a workflow, I am encountering the following error:

Action Identifier:
post_batch
Destination:
GET_DATA
Error Message:
Action '7a1f2496-6c0d-48ce-a724-9ca2651d8fab' failed with the following error:
'Action metadata not found in database for tenant f5a191b7-809f-4113-87fe-6b21da19d542, project us10.93112af8trial.getdatacall, version 1.0.3, action group b315b59d-bafd-3cbf-a4a2-79a0743dfac0, and action post_batch'.

Log ID:
fdc268b4-2c5c-439a-814b-802b67e-us10

I have also attached a screenshot of the configuration.
Please let me know how I can resolve this issue.

Destination Config Screenshot:

Action Config Screenshot:

 

BPA workflow Screenshot:

Thanks,

Parth

entry.title: If I run the automation in test mode of BPA, will it be counted as 1 connection and charge the cost?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am testing the scenario as following in the sap build process automation.

1. Retrieve the file content of the uploaded attachment file in the DMS.

2. Convert the file content to a specific file type and download in local path.

3. Send the downloaded file to the outlook mail.

 

I created the automation for the above processes.

I didn't release and deploy the entire project yet.

And now I would like to run in test mode.

If I run by using test mode, the desktop agent will be opened and the package will be loaded to desktop agent.

So, I would like to know that if it will be counted as 1 connection for attended (or) unattended mode and will charge a cost for it?

If not, when the connection will be counted to charge a cost and how many connection will be needed for my scenario?

Could you please explain for me?

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Am I Prepared for the C_LCNC_2406 Exam? Looking for Final Tips!
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm getting ready to take the C_LCNC_2406 – SAP Certified Associate - Low-Code/No-Code Developer exam and would really appreciate some input from those who've been through it.

Here's what my prep looks like so far:

  • Completed BTP100 & BTP110 (Citizen Development fundamentals)
  • Finished APP400, SPA400, and WZ400 courses
  • Gained hands-on experience with SAP Build Apps, Process Automation, and Work Zone
  • Scored around 70–75% on mock tests
  • Using P2PCerts practice questions, which have been helpful for understanding the format and question style

Based on your experience, does this sound like solid prep?
Are there any key topics I should review again or any additional resources you’d recommend?

Thanks in advance for any tips or insights — especially from those who’ve passed recently!

entry.title: Build Process Automation get workflow instances from shared environment
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm trying to get the workflow instances that are running in a shared environment in build process automation from Postman.

If I try to get them from the public environment I get a list of the running instances, but from the shared environment I get a 200 OK with an empty list. 

I put the environmentId as query parameter and irpa-api-key as header and configured the authorization. I'm able to activate a process in a shared environment from Postman, so I know those settings are correct.

I also made sure that there are running instances in the shared environment.

Does anyone know where the problem lies?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Error "Rule Service with given ID does not exist" when Consuming Decision Table API(SBPA)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created a decision table in SAP Build Process Automation and have successfully released and deployed the project. Following this, I created a trigger from the deployed decision table.

However, when I try to consume this API via Postman, I encounter the following error message:

"The rule service with given id xxxxxxxxxxxxx does not exist."

Has anyone come across this error before? Any insights or suggestions to resolve this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Call a destination(OAuth2UserTokenExchange) from SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I am trying to call a destination from SAP Build Process Automation.

The destination is configured with authorization OAuth2UserTokenExchange.

I get error while using the "Call web service with destination" activity and also while configuring the actions.

Please look at the attached screenshots.

Kindly help me on how to resolve this.

Regards

entry.title: Help with Role Type and Business Partner Fields in 4JA Mass Maintenance Template
entry.content:
I'm currently working on the Mass Maintenance of Enterprise Projects (4JA) scenario in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This process is part of the SAP Build Process Automation content package, which enables us to perform bulk updates to enterprise project master data using an Excel-based input template uploaded via SAP Build Work Zone.

While preparing the input template for upload, I’m unclear about the correct values to provide for the following fields: 

a) Role Type

b) BP or BP GUID number

 Regards,

Gunadharshini

entry.title: How to Generate a Dynamic URL for Approval Task in SAP Business Process Automation (SAP BPA)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm working on a workflow using SAP Build Process Automation and need help with generating a dynamic task approval link that can be sent via email notification to the approver.

Objective:

  • Generate a dynamic URL for each task instance.

  • Send the URL via email template or script task.

  • Clicking the link should open the approval task directly in My Inbox or SAP Build Work Zone / Launchpad.

Thanks in advance,
Parshuram

entry.title: User does not have sufficient privileges in Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi

I have created a process automation like a bellow example 
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-academy-salesorder.html

here it is working fine, and workflow is triggering while creating the instance from Process and Workflow>> Start New instance and Close. 

But when i created the Build App for the API like bellow:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html

But here it is giving error at the time for workflow instance 

"responseText": "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"bpm.workflowruntime.rest.user.not.sufficient.privileges\",\"message\":\"User does not have sufficient privileges.\"}}"

I have assign the role also, But still giving error. Can any one help me please....
